report_metadata.title: 99acres Detailed Search #1 - Commercial Shop Rentals in Sankarankovil, Tamil Nadu
search_queries_attempted: site:99acres.com commercial shop rent Sankarankovil Tirunelveli contact
99acres Sankarankovil shop rent phone number owner
99acres.com Sankarankovil commercial property rent contact details
99acres Sankarankoil shop for rent broker contact
99acres Sankarankovil ground floor shop rent address
report_metadata.search_status: API_RATE_LIMITED - z-ai web_search, page_reader, and chat_completions APIs were persistently rate-limited (HTTP 429) during this session. Additionally, 99acres.com blocks all automated access via Akamai CDN (Access Denied). All major search engines (Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, Yahoo, Yandex, Ecosia, Startpage, Mojeek) returned CAPTCHA/bot detection pages for our IP. Data below is compiled from previous successful searches stored in project files.
data_sources_used: Previous web_search API results (search1.json through search8.json)
Previous search result snippets from multiple sessions

search_limitations.api_rate_limiting: z-ai web_search, page_reader, and chat_completions APIs returned persistent HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) throughout this session. Previous sessions also encountered this issue after 4-10 successful queries.
search_limitations.99acres_blocking: 99acres.com uses Akamai/EdgeSuite CDN-level bot protection that returns 'Access Denied' (HTTP 403) for all automated requests from cloud servers. Individual listing pages cannot be accessed to extract contact phone numbers, owner names, exact addresses, or detailed amenities.
search_limitations.search_engine_blocking: All major search engines (Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, Yahoo, Yandex, Ecosia, Startpage, Mojeek) returned CAPTCHA or bot detection pages during this session, preventing new searches.
search_limitations.contact_info_gating: Even when listing snippets are visible in search results, contact phone numbers and owner names are always gated behind the listing page, which is inaccessible due to 99acres bot protection.

critical_missing_data.contact_phone_numbers: UNABLE TO EXTRACT ANY CONTACT PHONE NUMBERS FROM 99ACRES - all contact info requires page-level access which is blocked
critical_missing_data.owner_names: UNABLE TO EXTRACT ANY OWNER NAMES FROM 99ACRES - only found S. Selvaraj (RealEstateIndia, not 99acres)
critical_missing_data.exact_street_addresses: PARTIALLY AVAILABLE - only 2 listings had specific street addresses (L9: Thiruvengadam Road; L10: Tirunelveli-Sankarankovil Highway)
critical_missing_data.deposit_amounts: Only found for L5 (10 months rent)

to_get_contact_numbers: Visit 99acres.com URLs directly from a regular web browser (not automated) - the listing pages should be accessible with normal browser cookies/JS
Create a free 99acres account and use their 'Contact Seller' feature for each listing
Call 99acres customer support: 1800-102-2663 for assistance with specific listings
Contact Santhosh Agency in Sankarankoil directly (search their number on Justdial)
Visit Shanthi Shopping Complex, opposite Sankarankovil Bus Stand to find local estate agents
to_find_more_listings: Search OLX.in manually: https://www.olx.in/sankarankoil_g4059208/for-rent-shops-offices_c1731 (3,600+ listings found in previous searches)
Check Dinamalar and Dinathanthi newspaper classifieds (primary channel for Tier-3 towns)
Ask local contacts to add you to Sankarankovil WhatsApp property groups
Conduct physical survey around: Bus Stand area, Kandiyaperi Road, Rajapalayam Road, Thiruvengadam Road
